name: feature.interactive-artifacts.agents
description: Visualizer agent (ADR 0128). Turns a request into an interactive diagram / chart / HTML canvas rendered in the EXISTING chat artifact workbench — composes the existing AI chat + the feature.interactive-artifacts.nodes pack; no new chat surface. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Visualizer
agents.description: Turns a request into an interactive diagram, chart, or HTML canvas rendered live in the artifact workbench. Uses openwop:feature.interactive-artifacts.nodes.render.
